identity.tagline: Eye to eye with the moment.
identity.shortBio: David J. Richards is building his voice as a photographer one frame at a time.
identity.longBio: David's work moves between sports, family, studio practice, creative experiments, and everyday details. The common thread is attention: looking long enough to notice the thing other people might miss.

strategy.purpose: Show David's developing point of view and invite people to experience or support his photography.
primaryAudience: People interested in David's creative journey
strategy.keyMessage: DJR Photography is a real person learning to look closely, move with purpose, and tell stories through the lens.
supportingMessages: Practice and persistence are part of the story.
People and feeling come before posing.
strategy.desiredAudienceResponse: See David's point of view, follow his growth, or invite him to photograph a meaningful moment.

voice.summary: Observant, human, cinematic, encouraging, and grounded.

traits.name: Observant
traits.description: Notice faces, posture, light, feeling, and overlooked details.

traits.name: Human
traits.description: Keep David and the people he photographs at the center.

traits.name: Cinematic
traits.description: Make room for imagination while distinguishing it from documentary work.
traits.dont: Present imagined scenes as documentary fact.

toneByContext.story: Reflective and specific, with attention to practice and growth.
toneByContext.invitation: Warm and direct without pressure or promises.
toneByContext.sensitiveTopics: Respect David's agency and avoid pity, inspiration clichés, or speaking for him.

accessibilityNotes: Explain photography terms when context does not make them clear.

messaging.originStory: A camera became David's way of stepping into the world, learning to look closely, and building confidence one frame at a time.
messaging.publicMessage: The dream. The hard work. The moment. The capture.
proofPoints: Sports, family, studio, and creative photography
A growing body of participant-selected work
Practice behind the camera and attention to human moments
personalBoundaries: Do not define David through disability.
Do not present AI-created imagery as documentary photography.

approvedCallsToAction.label: Contact DJR
approvedCallsToAction.description: Invite a photography or collaboration inquiry through the admin-owned DJR contact route.

approvedCallsToAction.label: See the Work
approvedCallsToAction.description: Invite visitors to view David's photography through an admin-owned gallery route.

photoStyle.summary: Documentary observation with cinematic energy and honest human moments.
avoid: Mislabeling AI imagery as documentary work

visualDirection.accessibilityIntent: Keep text highly legible, focus states visible, and motion optional while allowing photography to lead.

governance.notes: Version 1 records existing DJR brand direction. It does not change the current DJR design or routes.
